title: Vanillaplus Ultimate
body:
**# FABRIC API REQUIRED**

### This is a mod that aims to add onto the vanilla experience and make it more enjoyable and complete, the aim of this mod is to add features that overhaul vanilla minecraft while having the same feel.

# Features:

## sculk:
### 1. new sculk dimension with 2 biomes the sculk forest and wasteland
### 2. 3 new mobs:
  - The sentry which drops sculk veins and a reinforced deepslate shards
  - The sculk zombie which drops rotten flesh and sculk veins
  - The deep crawler which drops sculk veins and sculk blocks
### 3. new sculk effect which slows you down a lot and stops you from jumping
### 4. 2 new structures, the sculk fortress and the sculk stronghold for you to explore!
### 5. A new wardens heart which is dropped by the warden and is required to make warden armor (along with a new warden upgrade template)
### 6. A new wardens skin which allows you to craft warden skin armor
### 7. reinforced deepslate shards can be found all over sculk themed chests and are combined with deepslate to craft reinforced deepslate which can be turned into reinforced deepslate bricks.
### 8. A new dark slayer boss that drops a dark core used to craft a warden sword
### 9. New set of sculk wood found in the sculk dimension
### 10. added new key which when combined with wardens heart makes and activated key which then you can light the ancient city portal (make sure to remove all sculk vein on portal before use)

## building:
### 1. added andesite, diorite and granite bricks and their variants
### 2. added concrete stairs, slabs and walls
### 3. added the nether brick fence gate

## overworld:
### 1. added palm trees and wood group
### 2. added naturally generating quicksand pools in the desert (prevent falling with leather boots)
### 3. added smaller desert pyramid (more on the way later)
### 4. added fallen logs (EXTREMLY buggy)
### 5. added silver ore (more on that on the materials section)

## materials and tools:
### 1. added silver and copper armor and tools (both like iron but with stat debuffs and boosts, choose one wisly as they are opposites!) armor effects apply with full armor

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
copper is associated with speed while silver is slower but heavier (aka more protection)

</details>


### 2. added amethyst armor and tools (like diamond but slightly different)
### 3. added warden armor and sword (more on that in the top section)
### 4. added new metal detector when right clicked detects for any metals (iron, gold, silver or copper) under the block

## villages:
### 1. added builder, miner and beekeeper huts and villagers
### 2. added new mining bench (workstation for miner villager)

## miscellaneous:
### 1. added soul jack o lanterns
### 2. added cherries which fall from cherry trees
### 3. added the coconut (currently unobtainable in survival but left for future use)
### 4. added quicksand bucket

## technical:
### 1. added new usable_beehive replacing the normal one for villager use

## keep in mind this mod is still in the alpha phase and there is more to come so stay tuned!
